codeReview.summary: The feature introduces Indian payroll calculations, statutory deduction fields, posting-liability lines, payment-date persistence, and dedicated tests. However, migration coverage is incomplete for the active flyway-v2 path: V150 adds required columns to v1 migrations, but no equivalent migration_v2 script exists, causing codered payroll validation to fail on the v2 schema with missing columns/entities in dependent flows.

issues.description: No migration_v2 script mirrors V150 payroll_indian_components changes (esi_eligibility_threshold/professional_tax/payment_date/new payroll_run_lines columns and statutory account seeds), but production profile defaults to flyway-v2, creating schema drift for integration/codered validation paths.

Codered payroll suite fails in this repo state (10/10 errors) due to migration_v2 schema mismatch (missing finished_good_batches.source in bootstrap path), indicating the feature's claimed codered verification cannot be treated as passing milestone evidence.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Current services.yaml validator set intentionally excludes codered/integration checks, so scrutiny pass/fail decisions can miss migration_v2 regressions unless manually exercised.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: services.yaml defines compile + gate-fast + advisory lint only; codered payroll run surfaced blocking v2 schema drift not covered by standard validators.

summary: Fail due to v2 schema migration gap and reproducible codered payroll breakage under active migration profile.
